app.title: HIPAA Free Chat
app.description: Secure healthcare messaging with AI-powered HIPAA compliance

home.subtitle: Connect with your health provider safely. Our AI monitors every message to ensure HIPAA compliance — protecting patient privacy in real-time.
home.feature1Desc: Every message is scanned by AI before sending to detect Protected Health Information and prevent accidental HIPAA violations.
home.feature2Desc: Instant communication between patients and healthcare providers with secure WebSocket connections.
home.feature3Desc: All blocked messages are logged for compliance auditing, ensuring full transparency and accountability.

chat.noConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
chat.blockedReason: This message was blocked because it may contain Protected Health Information (PHI):
chat.blockedTip: Tip: Avoid including patient names, SSNs, medical record numbers, or specific diagnoses with identifying information in chat messages.
